--- 
title: "Teacher view - Class overview"
format: 
    dashboard :
        scrolling: True
        
jupyter : python3
--- 

```{python}
import pandas as pd 
import altair as alt
data = pd.read_excel('data/raw/final_data.xlsx', sheet_name='Student_Observations')
initial_model_output = pd.read_csv('data/output/group_initial_model.csv')
kc = pd.read_excel('data/raw/final_data.xlsx', sheet_name='KC_Nodes')
group = pd.read_excel('data/raw/grouped_data.xlsx', sheet_name=1)
merged_data = initial_model_output.merge(group[['modeling_kc_id','modeling_kc_label']], left_on = 'skill_name', right_on='modeling_kc_id').drop(columns=['Unnamed: 0','modeling_kc_id'])

kc['unit'] = kc['reporting_group'].str.split(':', expand=True)[0]
kc['sub_unit'] = kc['reporting_group'].str.split(':', expand=True)[1]
threshold = 0.7
```

## Row {height=5%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: Number of Students
kc_group = merged_data.groupby('skill_name')[['state_predictions']].mean()
kc_below_threshold = len(kc_group.query(f'state_predictions < {threshold}'))
nb_kc = len(kc_group) 
dict(
    value = merged_data['user_id'].nunique()
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: Number of KCs
kc_group = merged_data.groupby('skill_name')[['state_predictions']].mean()
nb_kc = len(kc_group) 
dict(
    value = nb_kc 
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: Number of Units 
dict(
    value = kc['unit'].nunique()
)
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: Number of Assignments 
dict(
    value = data['assignment_id'].nunique()
)
```
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: Avg number of items per KC

dict(
    value = round(group['num_items'].mean())
)
```
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Avg mastery — first attempt"

first_attempt = merged_data.groupby(['user_id','skill_name'])['state_predictions'].first().mean() * 100
dict(value = f"{first_attempt:.2f}%")
```

```{python}
#| content: valuebox  
#| title: "Avg mastery — latest attempt"
last_attempt = merged_data.groupby(['user_id','skill_name'])['state_predictions'].last().mean()* 100
dict(value = f"{last_attempt:.2f}%")
```


## Row {height=10%}

```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: KCs with mastery probability below 40%
kc_group = merged_data.groupby('skill_name')[['state_predictions']].mean()
kc_below_threshold = len(kc_group.query('state_predictions < 0.4'))
dict(
    value = kc_below_threshold,
    color = '#e57373'
)
```
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: KCs with mastery probability between  40-70% 
kc_group = merged_data.groupby('skill_name')[['state_predictions']].mean()
kc_below_threshold = len(kc_group.query('state_predictions < 0.7 & state_predictions > 0.4'  ))
dict(
    value = kc_below_threshold,
    color = '#f0a500'
)
```
```{python}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: KCs with mastery probability above 70%
kc_group = merged_data.groupby('skill_name')[['state_predictions']].mean()
kc_below_threshold = len(kc_group.query('state_predictions > 0.7'))
dict(
    value = kc_below_threshold,
    color = '#4caf77'
)
```

## Row {height=30%}

```{python}
#| title: Mastery Probability Distribution
hist = alt.Chart(merged_data).transform_calculate(
    zone=f"""
        datum.state_predictions >= {threshold} ? 'Mastered' :
        datum.state_predictions >= 0.4 ? 'Developing' : 'At risk'
    """
).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X('state_predictions:Q', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30), title='Mastery Probability'),
    y=alt.Y('count()', title='Count'),
    color=alt.Color('zone:N', scale=alt.Scale(
        domain=['At risk', 'Developing', 'Mastered'],
        range=['#e57373', '#f0a500', '#4caf77']
    ), legend=alt.Legend(title='Zone')),
    tooltip=['count()']
)

# Mastery threshold line
rule = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({'x': [threshold]})).mark_rule(
    strokeDash=[4, 4], color='gray', size=1.5
).encode(x='x:Q')

(hist + rule).properties(title='Mastery Probability Distribution')
```

```{python}
#| title: KC difficulty Ranking
kc_difficulty = (
    merged_data
    .groupby('modeling_kc_label')['state_predictions']
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
    .rename(columns={'state_predictions': 'avg_mastery'})
    .sort_values('avg_mastery')
)
alt.Chart(kc_difficulty[:10]).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X('avg_mastery', title = 'Average mastery'),
    y=alt.Y('modeling_kc_label', sort='x', title = 'Skill name'),
    tooltip=alt.Tooltip(['avg_mastery'], title = 'Average mastery')
).properties(
    title = 'Top 10 KCs with lowest Mastery Probability',
)

kc_difficulty = (
    merged_data
    .groupby('modeling_kc_label')['state_predictions']
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
    .rename(columns={'state_predictions': 'avg_mastery'})
    .sort_values('avg_mastery')
)
alt.Chart(kc_difficulty[-10:]).mark_bar().encode(
    x=alt.X('avg_mastery', title = 'Average mastery'),
    y=alt.Y('modeling_kc_label', sort='x', title = 'Skill name'),
    tooltip=alt.Tooltip(['avg_mastery'], title = 'Average mastery')
).properties(
    title = 'Top 10 KCs with highest Mastery Probability',
)
```
## Row {height=30%}

```{python}
merged_data = merged_data.sort_values(['user_id', 'skill_name', 'order_id'])
merged_data['kc_attempt'] = (
    merged_data
    .groupby(['user_id', 'skill_name'])
    .cumcount() + 1
)
# Then average across students for each KC at each attempt number
mastery_over_time = (
    merged_data
    .groupby(['kc_attempt', 'skill_name'])['state_predictions']
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
    .rename(columns={'state_predictions': 'avg_mastery'})
)
kc_selection = alt.selection_point(fields=['skill_name'], bind='legend')

alt.Chart(mastery_over_time).mark_line(point=True).encode(
    x=alt.X('kc_attempt:Q', title='Attempt number (per KC)'),
    y=alt.Y('avg_mastery:Q', title='Average mastery', scale=alt.Scale(domain=[0, 1])),
    color=alt.Color('skill_name:N', legend=alt.Legend(title='KC')),
    opacity=alt.condition(kc_selection, alt.value(1), alt.value(0.1)),
    tooltip=[
        alt.Tooltip('skill_name:N', title='KC'),
        alt.Tooltip('kc_attempt:Q', title='Attempt'),
        alt.Tooltip('avg_mastery:Q', title='Avg mastery', format='.3f')
    ]
).add_params(kc_selection).properties(
    title='Mastery over time per KC',
)
```
